summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Angular 18 + Node.js authentication system. All backend APIs (12/12) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Registration, login, logout, forgot password, and dashboard flows fully functional with excellent UI/UX.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (200 OK)
User registration with validation (201 Created)
User login with remember me functionality (200 OK)
Get current user profile (200 OK)
User logout and session cleanup (200 OK)
Forgot password with demo token generation (200 OK)
Password reset flow (200 OK)
Invalid credentials handling (401 Unauthorized)
Form validation (email format, password mismatch) (400 Bad Request)
Login page loads with all elements (email, password, remember me, forgot password, Google login)
Register page loads with all form fields (name, email, password, confirm password)
Registration flow: form submission → user creation → dashboard redirect
Login flow: credentials → authentication → dashboard redirect
Dashboard displays user information (name, email, user ID, security status, auth provider)
Logout functionality: logout button → session cleanup → login redirect
Forgot password page navigation and form submission
Navigation between login/register/forgot-password pages
Toast notifications for success/error messages
Frontend-backend integration for all auth endpoints
Session management and authentication state
Google OAuth integration ready (buttons present, backend endpoint available)
